sections_cited: Section 129 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1430 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1. For order on Misc. No. 7053/2023 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection Nos. 1 & 11. 3. For order on Misc. No. 7054/2023 (Exemption/App) 4. For order on Misc. No. 7055/2023 (Stay/App) 5. For order on Misc. No. 7077/2023 (Stay/App) 6. For hearing of main case. ----------------- 16.03.2023. Mr. S. Muhammad Hasan Meerza, Advocate for Petitioner. ----------------- 1. Granted. 2, 3, 4, 5 & 6. Through this Petition, the Petitioner has impugned an Order passed by the Commissioner (Appeals) Inland Revenue under Section 129 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Petitioner’s Counsel has been confronted as to maintainability of this petition as well as the office objections raised in this behalf and Counsel submits that Petitioner is in the process of filing an appeal before the Tribunal as provided under the Ordinance. In that case, the Petition appears to be misconceived and not maintainable; hence dismissed accordingly with pending applications. Judge Judge Ayaz
